scope: Bounded live probe of confirmed rail indicators + known error/archived ids. No full collector run, no MinIO, no backfill.
api_note: The World Bank Indicators API returns HTTP 200 even for invalid/archived ids; the failure appears only in the body as [{"message": [...]}]. Status-code checks cannot catch this, so worldbank.series_has_observations() validates the parsed payload before landing.

probes.label: Rail lines (total route-km)
probes.note: All-country series; first page rows are aggregate nulls, so validation checks structure/total rather than the first non-null value.

probes.label: Transport services BoP (previously discovered too-broadly; archived for this path)

message.value: The indicator was not found. It may have been deleted or archived.

probes.note: This is the 128-byte error payload reported in PARSER_WORK_LOG. It is now rejected by series_has_observations() instead of being landed.

message.value: The provided parameter value is not valid

result: All three confirmed rail indicators return HTTP 200 with real time series. Both error/archived ids return HTTP 200 with {"message": ...} envelopes and are now rejected before landing.
